_caveat: This file is a specification of a Guardian 3.6 Policy Integrity Test baseline, built from Guardian's documented feature description (declared input documents + expected output documents, saved as a named, re-runnable baseline). It has not been validated against Guardian's exact internal file format -- use the input/expected values below to register the real baseline through Guardian's own Policy Integrity Test UI.
policyName: ACM0014 v8.0 Treatment of Wastewater dMRV (Policy C)
description: Realistic (non-placeholder) end-to-end test derived from the Chok Chai Starch Co. wastewater treatment project (Thailand, CDM/ACM0014, DOE-verified by JQA). Confirms the full BE/PE/LE/ER chain -- including the van't Hoff-Arrhenius temperature-factor calculation and its division-by-zero guard -- evaluates to real numbers, not null or unevaluated formula text.

steps.inputDocument: see ACM0014_test_fixture.json in this same folder for full field values

steps.expectedMintAmount: matches field55 exactly, confirmed in live testing (32384.34, 32799.65 across two separate runs)

negativeCaseIncluded.name: ACM0014_PolicyC_divzero_guard_test
negativeCaseIncluded.description: Confirms the fTy division-by-zero guard handles both the zero AND negative denominator cases without leaving any field null or as unevaluated formula text.
